content: KEERTHANA B V Full Stack Developer | React.js | Node.js | Python | REST APIs | AI-Integrated Applications +91 9901724479 | keerthana.b.v.codes@gmail.com | Bengaluru, Karnataka | LinkedIn | GitHub | Portfolio | Blog PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY I build and ship. Promoted from intern to developer in 3 months. Deployed a BERT model that hit 84.9% F1 on a legal benchmark dataset. Configured Linux VPS servers that serve real clients in production. My work sits at the intersection of full-stack engineering and applied AI equally comfortable designing a PostgreSQL schema, integrating a transformer model, and writing Nginx config. Presented original research at NCRIE-2025. TECHNICAL SKILLS Core Stack: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, Python, JavaScript (ES6+), PostgreSQL, RESTful APIs Frontend: Next.js, React Router, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, HTML5, CSS3, Framer Motion Backend & Data: Python Flask, SQLAlchemy, Prisma ORM, MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase, JWT, bcrypt, Nodemailer AI / Machine Learning: BERT, OpenAI API, SHAP, LIME, Explainable AI (XAI), NLP, OCR (tesseract.js) DevOps & Tools: Nginx, Linux VPS, Git, GitHub, Netlify, Vercel, Postman, Jira, Recharts, NPM Workspaces WORK EXPERIENCE Software Developer | ASPL Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd. — Bengaluru, India Oct 2025 – Present Joined as Intern (Oct 2025), promoted to Full-Time Developer (Jan 2026) • Shipped 8+ production web applications using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and PostgreSQL for clients across multiple industries, each delivered on time and deployed to live infrastructure. • Built a full-stack HRMS using React.js and Python Flask, replacing paper-based workflows with digital onboarding, attendance tracking, and leave management across 4 departments. • Implemented Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) using PyJWT and bcrypt, enforcing strict data isolation across Admin, HR, Manager, and Employee portals — each role restricted to its own data scope. • Designed RESTful APIs with SQLAlchemy ORM over PostgreSQL for complex multi-table queries across user profiles, attendance, and leave records; built Recharts dashboards for real-time HR analytics. • Architected a full-stack research platform using Next.js and NPM Workspaces with a monorepo structure — separate frontend, admin, and backend environments, Prisma ORM, and NextAuth.js authentication. • Deployed 3+ client websites on Hostinger Linux VPS with Nginx reverse proxy, SSL/TLS configuration, and domain setup — built reusable server config templates now used across all new deployments. PROJECTS AI-Powered Legal Document Analysis with Trust & Safety Framework | React.js, Node.js, BERT, Python, OpenAI API | GitHub • Engineered a full-stack MERN application for real-time AI-driven legal clause extraction — users upload PDFs or Word documents and receive structured risk analysis within seconds. • Fine-tuned a Python-based BERT transformer model to 84.9% F1-score and 84.7% accuracy on the CUAD benchmark dataset (510 legal contracts); integrated OpenAI API to convert model outputs into plain-language risk summaries. • Built a Trust & Safety module with automated PII redaction and a live dashboard for fairness auditing, privacy analysis, and model evaluation; research paper presented at NCRIE-2025, KSIT. Explainable AI Clinical Decision Support Dashboard | Python, Streamlit, SHAP, LIME • Built a Streamlit dashboard that predicts heart disease risk and explains predictions using SHAP and LIME visualizations, giving clinicians transparent insight into model behaviour. • Developed a comparison module to quantitatively evaluate XAI method consistency across patients, enabling measurable confidence scoring for clinical decision support. (Academic Project, 2024–2025)

Angel's Empyrean Kindergarten — Client Website | React 19, Vite, Framer Motion, React Router | Live Site • Built a fully responsive single-page application using React 19 and Vite; implemented React Router navigation across 6+ sections with Framer Motion scroll-reveal animations. • Integrated an external admission form workflow and deployed on Netlify with continuous deployment configured for zero-touch updates on new pushes. CERTIFICATIONS & AWARDS • Best Paper Presentation Award — National Conference on Recent Innovations in Engineering (NCRIE-2025), KSIT • Certified MERN Stack Developer — Dyashin Technosoft EDUCATION Master of Computer Applications (MCA) Aug 2025 RV Institute of Technology and Management, Bengaluru | CGPA: 8.2 Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) Sept 2023 Community Institute of Commerce and Management, Bengaluru | CGPA: 8.4

KEERTHANA B V Full Stack Developer · Applied AI · Bengaluru RAG Knowledge Document · Q&A Format · Optimised for Vector Embedding & Semantic Retrieval n IDENTITY & OVERVIEW Q: Who is Keerthana B V? A: Keerthana B V is a Full Stack Developer based in Bengaluru, Karnataka, India. She builds and ships AI-augmented web applications across the full stack — from PostgreSQL schema design and REST API development to BERT model integration and Linux VPS deployment with Nginx. She was promoted from intern to full-time developer in 3 months at ASPL Tech Solutions after shipping 8+ production applications for real clients. [TAGS: identity, who is, overview, bio, introduction, about] Q: What is Keerthana's contact information? A: Phone: +91 9901724479 | Email: keerthana.b.v.codes@gmail.com | Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India | Portfolio: keerthanabv.in | Blog: blog.keerthanabv.in | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/keerthana-b-v | GitHub: github.com/keerthana-b-v [TAGS: contact, email, phone, linkedin, github, portfolio, location] Q: What kind of roles is Keerthana looking for? A: Keerthana is actively looking for full-time roles in Full Stack Development or AI-integrated web applications in Bengaluru. She is open to remote work and startup environments where engineers own features end-to-end. She is especially strong in roles that combine modern web engineering with applied AI. [TAGS: job search, hiring, open to work, roles, opportunities] Q: What makes Keerthana stand out as a candidate? A: Three things stand out: (1) She was promoted from intern to full-time developer in just 3 months by shipping 8+ production apps on deadline. (2) Her BERT-based legal AI project achieved 84.9% F1-score on the CUAD benchmark and won Best Paper at NCRIE-2025. (3) She has real production deployment experience — 3+ client sites live on Linux VPS with Nginx and SSL/TLS, not just localhost demos. [TAGS: differentiator, strengths, why hire, unique, standout]

n EDUCATION Q: What is Keerthana's highest qualification? A: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) from RV Institute of Technology and Management (RVITM), Bengaluru. Graduated August 2025. CGPA: 8.2/10. [TAGS: education, MCA, degree, qualification, RVITM, masters] Q: What undergraduate degree does Keerthana hold? A: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) from Community Institute of Commerce and Management, Bengaluru. Graduated September 2023. CGPA: 8.4/10. [TAGS: BCA, undergraduate, bachelor, education, degree] Q: What certifications does Keerthana hold? A: Keerthana is a Certified MERN Stack Developer from Dyashin Technosoft. She also received the Best Paper Presentation Award at the National Conference on Recent Innovations in Engineering (NCRIE-2025) at KSIT, Bengaluru. [TAGS: certifications, awards, MERN, NCRIE, best paper] n WORK EXPERIENCE Q: Where does Keerthana currently work? A: Keerthana works as a Full-Stack Developer at ASPL Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd., Bengaluru. She joined as an intern in October 2025 and was promoted to full-time developer in January 2026 — just 3 months after joining. [TAGS: current job, ASPL, work experience, employer, company] Q: How many production applications has Keerthana shipped? A: Keerthana has shipped 8+ production web applications using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and PostgreSQL for clients across 4+ industries, each delivered on schedule and deployed to live infrastructure. [TAGS: production apps, shipped, portfolio, experience, applications] Q: What was Keerthana's most impactful work project at ASPL? A: Her most impactful project was building a full-stack HRMS (Human Resource Management System) using React.js and Python Flask that digitized onboarding, attendance, and leave management across 4 departments for a real client — completely eliminating manual paper-based processes. [TAGS: HRMS, impactful, project, Flask, digitization, work]

Q: What backend and security architecture did Keerthana implement at ASPL? A: Keerthana engineered Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) using PyJWT and bcrypt across 4 distinct user roles (Admin, HR, Manager, Employee). She designed RESTful APIs with SQLAlchemy ORM over PostgreSQL for complex multi-table queries and built Recharts dashboards for real-time HR analytics. [TAGS: RBAC, JWT, security, authentication, PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy, API] Q: What is researchvisions.com and what did Keerthana build for it? A: researchvisions.com is a full-stack research platform Keerthana architected at ASPL using Next.js 14 and NPM Workspaces. She built a monorepo with 3 separate environments (frontend, admin, backend), Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL, and NextAuth.js for authentication. [TAGS: researchvisions, Next.js, monorepo, NPM workspaces, Prisma, NextAuth] Q: What DevOps experience does Keerthana have? A: Keerthana has deployed and maintained 3+ client websites on Hostinger Linux VPS. She configured Nginx as a reverse proxy, set up SSL/TLS certificates, and managed domain routing for all live production sites. She built reusable Nginx config templates now used across all new deployments at ASPL. [TAGS: DevOps, Nginx, Linux VPS, SSL, deployment, server, production] n PROJECTS nn Project 1: AI-Powered Legal Document Analysis nn Q: What is the AI-Powered Legal Document Analysis project? A: It is a full-stack application that allows users to upload PDF or Word legal contracts and receive structured AI risk analysis in seconds. A fine-tuned BERT model extracts clauses; OpenAI API converts the output into plain-language risk summaries. A Trust and Safety module auto-redacts PII before any model sees the data, with a live fairness auditing dashboard. [TAGS: legal AI, BERT, contract analysis, NLP, OpenAI, project] Q: What benchmark performance did Keerthana's BERT model achieve? A: The fine-tuned BERT model achieved 84.9% F1-score and 84.7% accuracy on the CUAD benchmark, trained on 510 real legal contracts. [TAGS: BERT, F1-score, accuracy, CUAD, benchmark, NLP, performance] Q: Was the Legal Document Analysis project published or awarded? A: Yes. The research paper was presented at NCRIE-2025 (National Conference on Recent Innovations in Engineering) at KSIT, Bengaluru and won the Best Paper Presentation Award. [TAGS: publication, award, NCRIE, KSIT, best paper, research]

Q: What tech stack did Keerthana use for the Legal AI project? A: React.js (frontend), Node.js (backend API), Python with BERT fine-tuning (ML layer), OpenAI API (language summaries), PostgreSQL (data storage). GitHub repository is publicly available. [TAGS: tech stack, legal AI, React, Node, Python, BERT, OpenAI, PostgreSQL] nn Project 2: WhatsApp E-Commerce Platform nn Q: What is the WhatsApp E-Commerce Platform project? A: A high-performance e-commerce platform built with React.js and TypeScript that reduces checkout friction by integrating the WhatsApp Web API for direct communication between customers and vendors. It includes a product catalog, cart management, and a full Admin Dashboard. [TAGS: WhatsApp, e-commerce, TypeScript, React, project, catalog] Q: How does the WhatsApp E-Commerce platform handle data storage? A: It uses a serverless data management approach leveraging browser LocalStorage to track order lifecycles and sales analytics — resulting in a zero-infrastructure-cost solution ideal for small business deployments. [TAGS: LocalStorage, serverless, storage, orders, data, small business] Q: What admin features does the WhatsApp E-Commerce platform have? A: The Admin Dashboard features real-time KPI tracking (Revenue, Leads, Conversions) and automated shipment notification workflows via India Post logistics integration. [TAGS: admin dashboard, KPI, revenue, logistics, India Post, shipment, analytics] Q: What tech stack was used for the WhatsApp E-Commerce project? A: React.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, WhatsApp Web API, and browser LocalStorage for persistent state management. [TAGS: tech stack, WhatsApp, React, TypeScript, Tailwind, LocalStorage] nn Project 3: Blood Donor Management System nn Q: What is the Blood Donor Management System project? A: A full-stack administrative web application to manage blood donation workflows. It supports CRUD operations for donors and recipients, a blood-type compatibility matching engine, and donation lifecycle tracking (Pending / Completed / Cancelled statuses). Includes an analytics dashboard and JWT-secured admin access. [TAGS: blood donor, CRUD, MongoDB, Flask, matching, project, healthcare]

Q: How does blood compatibility matching work in the Blood Donor system? A: A compatibility function on the Flask backend maps each recipient blood group to all compatible donor blood groups. The backend then queries MongoDB for available donors with compatible blood types and presents them to the admin for matching. [TAGS: blood compatibility, matching, algorithm, blood group, MongoDB, Flask] Q: What tech stack did Keerthana use for the Blood Donor Management System? A: Frontend: React.js and Vite with Bootstrap. Backend: Python Flask with Flask-CORS and Flask-PyMongo. Database: MongoDB (NoSQL). Authentication: JWT with bcrypt password hashing. [TAGS: tech stack, blood donor, React, Flask, MongoDB, JWT, bcrypt, Vite] Q: What analytics features does the Blood Donor Management System include? A: The Flask backend exposes analytics endpoints for donation trends by blood group, donations by month, and urgency-level distribution — making the data analytics-ready for future charting dashboards. [TAGS: analytics, trends, blood group, donation history, Flask API, MongoDB] nn TECHNICAL SKILLS Q: What is Keerthana's core tech stack? A: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, Python, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, PostgreSQL, RESTful APIs. [TAGS: core stack, React, Node, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, PostgreSQL] Q: What frontend technologies does Keerthana know? A: React.js (including React 19), Next.js 14, React Router, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, HTML5, CSS3, Framer Motion, JavaScript ES6+, TypeScript. [TAGS: frontend, React, Next.js, Tailwind, Vite, HTML, CSS, TypeScript] Q: What backend and database technologies does Keerthana use? A: Node.js, Express.js, Python Flask, SQLAlchemy ORM, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase, JWT, bcrypt, Nodemailer, NextAuth.js. [TAGS: backend, Node, Flask, SQLAlchemy, Prisma, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, JWT, database] Q: What AI and machine learning skills does Keerthana have? A: BERT (fine-tuning transformer models), OpenAI API integration, SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations), LIME (Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanations), Explainable AI (XAI), NLP, OCR with tesseract.js. [TAGS: AI, ML, BERT, OpenAI, SHAP, LIME, XAI, NLP, OCR, machine learning]

Q: What DevOps and tooling experience does Keerthana have? A: Nginx reverse proxy configuration, Linux VPS server administration, SSL/TLS setup, Git and GitHub, Netlify CI/CD, Vercel, Postman API testing, Jira (Agile/Scrum), Recharts, NPM Workspaces. [TAGS: DevOps, Nginx, Linux, SSL, Git, Netlify, Vercel, Postman, Jira, Agile] Q: What concepts and methodologies does Keerthana apply in her work? A: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), Agile and Scrum, CI/CD pipelines, RESTful API architecture, SSL/TLS, Linux server administration, data privacy, and PII compliance. [TAGS: RBAC, Agile, CI/CD, REST, security, data privacy, PII, methodologies] Q: What technologies is Keerthana currently exploring? A: LLM fine-tuning, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architectures, Docker, TypeScript (deepening), AWS and GCP cloud platforms. [TAGS: learning, exploring, LLM, RAG, Docker, TypeScript, AWS, GCP, future skills] n WORK STYLE & SOFT SKILLS Q: How does Keerthana approach ownership of work? A: Keerthana takes full end-to-end ownership of features — from schema design and API development to frontend UI and production deployment. Her promotion at ASPL within 3 months is a direct result of treating every task as a production problem, not just an assignment. [TAGS: ownership, work ethic, responsibility, promotion, attitude] Q: What kind of work environment does Keerthana thrive in? A: She thrives in startup environments where engineers own features end-to-end with minimal layers of bureaucracy. She moves fast, ships on deadline, and iterates based on real feedback from real clients. [TAGS: work environment, startup, culture, fast-paced, ownership] Q: Has Keerthana worked with real clients and live production systems? A: Yes. She has shipped 8+ production web applications for clients across 4+ industries, deployed 3+ sites on live Linux VPS infrastructure, and built a kindergarten client site (angels-empyrean.netlify.app) with real admission workflows deployed on Netlify with CI/CD. [TAGS: real clients, production, live, deployment, client work] This document is structured in Q&A format for optimal RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) performance. Each chunk contains a question, a dense answer, and semantic tags to minimise vector distance during retrieval. Source: keerthanabv.in · Resume · Direct project documentation.
